blockingIssues.description: src/e2e/multi-device/ecdh-roundtrip.spec.ts still does not assert runtimeCompletions on page B keyed by the same request_id; it substitutes responder evidence (InboundAccepted/last_seen), so the explicit fix contract remains unmet.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align m1 ECDH validation contract/feature expectations with bifrost protocol behavior (initiator-only ECDH completion), or expose a responder completion signal if both-side completion correlation remains required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m1-ecdh-roundtrip review found the test cannot satisfy the stated both-pages completion requirement because responder path emits EcdhResponse without CompletedOperation::Ecdh.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit deviation records when mandatory agent-browser/manual checks are skipped, and disallow followedProcedure=true in those cases.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple fix feature handoffs reported followedProcedure=true with no interactive checks despite runtime-worker/ui-screen-worker procedure language requiring agent-browser/manual verification.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine runtime-worker/ui-screen-worker verification requirements so pure non-UI/state-derivation fixes can use an explicit command-only path without violating procedure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m1-nonce-depletion-detection-policy-gated is a non-UI derivation change but was flagged against mandatory agent-browser wording.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify ui-screen-worker TDD enforcement by requiring explicit RED evidence in handoffs/transcripts when 'write failing tests first' is mandatory.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m1-peer-row-last-seen-progression transcript shows implementation edit before new test creation while handoff still marked followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reconcile ui-screen-worker Playwright pass requirement with known baseline failures marked do-not-fix in AGENTS.md (allow documented baseline-failure exceptions).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-m1-peer-row-last-seen-progression recorded Playwright failure caused by known nested-button issue that AGENTS marks as pre-existing/do-not-fix.

rejectedObservations.observation: runtime-worker agent-browser ambiguity noted in fix-m1-ecdh-roundtrip and fix-m1-nonce-depletion reviews.
